subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the love of God in the Lote-Tree of the Utmost Boundary! I rejoice with exceeding gladness at thy mention around the Lamp [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اشتعل بنار محبه الله فی سدره المنتهی قد ابتهج الابتهاج بذکرک حول السراج
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
